ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid character: the string to be decoded is not correctly encoded.
ast.target: 无效字符：要解码的字符串编码不正确。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The string to be encoded contains characters outside of the Latin1 range.
ast.target: 要编码的字符串包含 Latin1 范围之外的字符。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Could not fetch parent deck, if the relative path is wrong the parent deck either does not exist or is archived/deleted.
ast.target: 无法获取父牌组，如果相对路径错误，父牌组可能不存在或已归档/删除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: API Key from app.mochi.cards found in 'Account settings'.
ast.target: 在“账户设置”中找到的来自 app.mochi.cards 的 API 密钥。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 API 密钥

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please provide an API key in the Plugin Settings to use Mochi Cards Pro
ast.target: 请在插件设置中提供 API 密钥以使用 Mochi Cards Pro

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A delimiter is required in the Plugin Settings to use Mochi Cards Pro
ast.target: 需要在插件设置中提供分隔符以使用 Mochi Cards Pro
